page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: SCENE OF EVANGELION
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in Early November 2011. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2011/696359.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 4 regular and 2 secret figures (Metalic versions of Evangelion Test Type-01 and Evangelion Mark.06) in the line.
